examples: Puma is a kind of catlike animals.
They are large, yellow, and catlike.
His landing on his feet was catlike.
They jump on an electronic plate to measure whether their leg muscles are more catlike or powerful.
Built by NeuroSky and a Japanese partner, NecoMiMi is a set of catlike ears that perk up when the wearer's concentration intensifies, and flatten out when relaxed.
